sourceTitle: Approved Tools | AI Hub - StaffNet - The University of Manchester
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The University has announced a strategic collaboration with Microsoft, making Manchester the world's first university to deploy equitable Microsoft 365 Copilot access and training across its entire community. This means 65,000 colleagues and students will benefit from the full Microsoft 365 Copilot suite.
